records.question: Which departments are located in Linderman with a budget of at most 601283.6, where instructor Desyl earns exactly 48803.38 and student Porter has at most 111 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Porter' AND instructor.salary = 48803.38 AND department.building = 'Linderman' AND department.budget <= 601283.6 AND instructor.name = 'Desyl' AND student.tot_cred <= 111
records.pred_sql: select distinct department.dept_name from department join instructor on department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name join student on department.dept_name = student.dept_name where department.building = 'Linderman' and department.budget <= 601283.6 and instructor.name like '%desyl%' and instructor.salary = 48803.38 and student.name like '%porter%' and student.tot_cred <= 111 limit 5
records.thought: Need to find departments in Linderman building with budget ≤ 601283.6, joined with instructor table for Desyl's salary check (=48803.38), and student table for Porter's credits check (≤111). All conditions must be satisfied simultaneously through joins on dept_name.

records.question: Which departments have a budget of 276527.61, are located in the Main building, and have related course and instructor records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
WHERE department.budget = 276527.61 AND department.building = 'Main'
records.pred_sql: select department.dept_name from department where department.budget = 276527.61 and department.building = 'Main' and exists (select 1 from course where course.dept_name = department.dept_name) and exists (select 1 from instructor where instructor.dept_name = department.dept_name) limit 5
records.thought: Need to find departments matching specific budget and building criteria, then verify they have related courses and instructors. Will use exists subqueries to check for related records in course and instructor tables via the dept_name foreign key.
